name: Honey Raisin Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the flour, baking powder, and salt until combined.
2. In another mixing bowl, combine the raisin bran cereal, milk, and honey. Let stand for 1 to 2 minutes or until the cereal is softened. Add the egg and vegetable oil. Mix well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
3. Gradually add the flour mixture into the cereal mixture, stirring only until combined. Divide the batter evenly among 12 greased muffin cups in a 2-1/2 inch muffin pan.
4. Bake at 400°F for 18 to 20 minutes or until lightly browned and firm when touched.
5. Serve warm.
